The '''Kettrifee Air Mover''' was a model of troop transport employed by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:WookieeKettrifeeAirMover.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Air Mover at various angles.]]

It was maneuvered by repulsor jets and propelled by a single main engine mounted to the rear left. The Air Mover displayed the Wookiees' characteristic love of asymmetry, as did most of their vehicles.

{{Veh-stub}}
